edges.evidence_quote: The Hammerskins were affiliated with the record label 9% Productions.
The Hammerskins emerged in the late 1980s from the Dallas based Confederate Hammerskins.

edges.target: National Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaw Hammerskins are now defunct. Many Outlaw Hammerskins members attended the 2002 NordicFest, and the group was planning to provide security for a white pride festival hosted by the National Knights of the Ku Klux Klan.
edges.context: Outlaw Hammerskins planned to provide security for a festival hosted by National Knights of the Ku Klux Klan.

edges.evidence_quote: In October 2019, the Southern Cross Hammerskins along with Blood & Honour Australia held the annual Ian Stuart Donaldson Memorial Concert in Melbourne.
edges.context: Southern Cross Hammerskins and Blood & Honour co-hosted a concert.

edges.evidence_quote: Hammerskins operate in Finland under the moniker Crew 38.
edges.context: Crew 38 is the Finnish moniker for Hammerskins.

edges.evidence_quote: Since 2022 Finnish Blood & Honour has organized an annual "White Boy Summer Fest" together with Hammerskins and Veren Laki.
edges.context: Crew 38 (Hammerskins) cooperates with Blood & Honour in Finland.

edges.evidence_quote: Since 2022 Finnish Blood & Honour has organized an annual "White Boy Summer Fest" together with Hammerskins and Veren Laki.
Veren Laki (Law of Blood), a neo-Nazi combat sports collective connected to the Nordic Resistance Movement.
edges.context: Veren Laki is connected to the Nordic Resistance Movement.

edges.evidence_quote: Crew 38 came under police investigation in connection to the Kankaanpää terrorism arrests when the leader and members of the Finnish Atomwaffen group frequented the Crew 38 headquarters in Muurame and Kerava.
edges.context: Finnish Atomwaffen members frequented Crew 38 headquarters.

edges.evidence_quote: The Italian chapter of the Hammerskins goes by the name "Lealtà e Azione".
edges.context: Lealtà e Azione is the Italian chapter of Hammerskins.
Hammerskin Nation lists Rise Above Movement as an affiliate.
Hammerskin Nation lists Blue-and-Black Movement as an affiliate.
